title: Canvas Crafter
description: Draw your imagination. Forge your ultimate weapon!
body:
# CanvasCrafter

**Draw your imagination. Forge your ultimate weapon!**

Have you ever wanted to wield a custom-designed sword or a wacky pickaxe without leaving the game to mess with resource packs? **CanvasCrafter** is an innovative Fabric mod that introduces an in-game pixel art editor, allowing you to draw and instantly forge your own 3D weapons and tools!

---

### ✨ Key Features

* **In-Game Pixel Editor:** Smooth drawing system with customizable brush sizes, multiple colors, and an eraser.
* **Dynamic Weapon Forging:** Click "Craft Item" and watch your 2D drawing instantly transform into a fully functional 3D item in your hand.
* **Infinite Unique Designs:** Thanks to the latest Minecraft 1.21 Data Components, you can draw 100 different swords, and they will all coexist peacefully without overriding each other's textures!
* **God-Tier Power:** All crafted tools are based on Diamond gear and are automatically infused with Level 255 enchantments (Sharpness for Swords/Axes, Efficiency for Pickaxes/Shovels). They are not just toys; they are weapons of mass destruction!

---

### 📖 How to Use

1. **Craft the Canvas:** Surround 1 Diamond with 8 Sticks in a Crafting Table.
2. **Start Drawing:** Hold the Canvas and right-click to open the editor. Select your tool type (Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel), pick a color, and draw!
3. **Forge:** Click the "Craft Item" button.
4. **⚠️ IMPORTANT:** The first time you use it, press ESC, go to Options -> Resource Packs, and enable the "CanvasCrafter_Pack". You only need to do this ONCE! After that, all new weapons you draw will load automatically.

---

### ⚙️ Technical Details

* **Requires:** Fabric API
* **Version:** Minecraft 1.21+ (Built specifically for the newest 1.21.8 component system)
* **Note:** This mod dynamically generates items using underlying commands and components. You must have OP permissions (cheats enabled) in your world/server for the dynamic forging to work perfectly.
